'''Nime''' was a port city on the [[Roon Sea]] of [[Roon/Legends|Roon]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> Governor [[Bisad Koong|Koong]] had an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] outpost in this city and watched over the planet from there.

{{City-stub}}
